headline: Comfort Systems USA and Builders FirstSource have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Comfort Systems USA surges on data center demand and strong earnings growth, while Builders FirstSource struggles amid housing slowdown and falling estimates.

headline: Morgan Stanley Launches E*Trade Crypto Trading at 0.5%, Undercutting Coinbase and Schwab
summary: Morgan Stanley starts E*Trade crypto trading at 0.5%, charging less than Coinbase, Robinhood, and Schwab on each transaction.

headline: Morgan Stanley Undercuts Coinbase, Robinhood On BTC, ETH, SOL Trading Fees
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is rolling out cryptocurrency trading on its E*Trade platform charging 50 basis points per transaction, undercutting Coinbase
